files.contents:
Hello World

Static assets are being served from /public.

# Express + Tailwind Hello World

This app serves a static index.html via Express and serves static assets from the public directory. Tailwind CSS is configured and compiles to public/styles.css.

- Framework: Express
- Styling: Tailwind CSS

## Setup
1. Install dependencies:
   npm install

2. Build CSS (optional initially, but recommended):
   npm run build:css

## Run (TypeScript entry)
- Development with auto-reload:
  npm run dev

- Production build and start:
  npm run build && npm start

## Run (Plain JS entry)
Alternatively, you can run the plain Node server:
  npm run start:js

Then open http://localhost:3000

## Tests
Run automated tests:
  npm test

## Notes
- The root route (/) serves public/index.html.
- Static files (e.g., /styles.css) are served from public/.
- Tailwind CSS output is written to public/styles.css via npm run build:css.

notes: Use npm run dev for TS development or npm run start:js to run the plain JS server.
Run npm run build:css to generate Tailwind CSS into public/styles.css.
